# KamiKonn Git Commit Message Template
#
# Format: <type>(<scope>): <subject>
#
# Types: feat | fix | docs | style | refactor | test | chore | perf
# Scopes: auth | events | universities | rsvp | search | frontend | backend | ci | deps
#
# Example:
#   feat(events): add full-text search endpoint
#
# ---- BODY (optional, explain WHY not WHAT) ----


# ---- FOOTER (issue closing - REQUIRED if this commit resolves an issue) ----
# Use ONE of: Closes #N | Fixes #N | Resolves #N
# For multiple issues: one per line
#
# Closes #
